name: Johnnie Allen

contactInfo.office: 115 N. Main St., Suite 201, Henderson, TX 75652

bio: Johnnie Allen serves as the Rusk County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement for Rusk County from the county seat of Henderson. Sheriff Allen leads a department committed to protecting lives and property across this East Texas oil country community.
campaignPromises: Protect oil field equipment and infrastructure from theft
Enhance criminal investigation capabilities with modern forensics
Maintain a safe and secure county detention facility
Improve communication systems for better dispatch coverage
Strengthen community partnerships for crime prevention
